title: Config files live in /usr/local/etc on FreeBSD (highlight in release notes!)
body: Config files for non-base packages live in /usr/local/etc and **https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1544** changes the default paths in containers/image. This changes the skopeo Makefile to match.

comments.body: **NOTE**: This will only work if we vendor an updated c/image before a Skopeo release. Historically that’s consistently been the practice, just making a note here for posterity if something went wrong.
